data.title: Johnson Outdoors (Nasdaq: JOUT) announces quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per Class A share and $0.30 per Class B share.
data.description: Johnson Outdoors Inc., a prominent outdoor recreation equipment and technology innovator, headquartered in Racine, Wisconsin, disclosed today that their Board of Directors has sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend for their shareholders. The approved dividend amounts to $0.33 per Class A share and $0.30 per Class B share. The company trades on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol JOUT.

data.title: RadNet, Inc. execs to present at Jefferies Healthcare Services Conference on Sep 29, 2025 at 1:50 pm CT (11:50 am PT).
data.description: On September 26, 2025, RadNet, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDNT), a prominent provider of diagnostic imaging services through a network of outpatient centers, revealed that its CEO, Dr. Howard Berger, and CFO, Mark Stolper, are set to speak at the Jefferies Healthcare Services Conference. This event is scheduled for Monday, September 29, 2025, at 1:50 p.m. Central Time (11:50 a.m. Pacific Time). RadNet is recognized for its high-quality and cost-effective services across the nation.

data.title: Ragnarok Idle Adventure Plus gets ISBN code approved by Chinese govt. (NasdaqGM: GRVY) disclosed on Sep 24, 2025.
data.description: Gravity Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), a South Korean developer and publisher of online and mobile games, disclosed in Seoul on September 26, 2025, that their game Ragnarok Idle Adventure Plus, known as 仙境 传说: 梦 想天空 in Chinese, has been issued an ISBN code by the Chinese government on September 24, 2025. This Vertical Idle MMORPG game has received official recognition and approval for its distribution.

data.title: OMS Energy CEO How Meng Hock speaks at DFIN event for Southeast Asian companies considering US IPO, post successful Nasdaq listing.
data.description: OMS Energy Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: OMSE), a manufacturer of surface wellhead systems and oil country tubular goods for the oil and gas sector, shared that its CEO, Mr. How Meng Hock, has been invited as a prominent panelist at Donnelley Financial Solutions’ event catered to Southeast Asian firms contemplating a public listing. This event, titled “Inside the C-Suite: Real Stories on U.S. IPO & Public Listing,” follows OMS's recent accomplishment of getting listed on Nasdaq. This move highlights the Company’s dominance in the region and industry.

data.title: Qapita and Countsy partner to streamline equity management for Countsy's clients, enhancing administration capabilities.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Qapita, a top global equity management solutions provider, has formed a strategic partnership with Countsy, a prominent finance and HR solutions company under RGP. This collaboration aims to improve equity administration services for Countsy's clients. By utilizing Qapita's advanced software system, Countsy will streamline stock plan management for its range of companies. This non-exclusive partnership is set to enhance equity administration capabilities for Countsy's clients.

data.title: Ameriprise research shows 65% parents believe they'll have comfortable retirement, 36% worry about supporting adult children financially.
data.description: In a recent study conducted by Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP), it was found that 65% of parents are confident they will have enough savings to comfortably retire. However, 36% of them are concerned that financially supporting their adult children may affect their retirement plans. The research also revealed that 96% of parents who consult a financial advisor feel assured about achieving their top three financial goals. Additionally, 78% of these parents mentioned that their advisor has been beneficial in helping them attain these objectives.

data.title: VeBetterDAO reveals Neptune GM NFTs as the ninth tier of its cosmic series, offering upgraded benefits and governance for loyal members.
data.description: VeBetterDAO has released Neptune GM NFTs as part of its cosmic journey, now totaling nine tiers. These NFTs offer increased rewards and governance opportunities for loyal members of the platform.

data.title: New tariffs by Trump stun Asian countries, source of 40% of US imports, amid ongoing trade war turmoil. Talks yield no progress.
data.description: In Asia, the region accounting for approximately 40% of U.S. imports, negotiations have yielded minimal results despite weeks of discussions aimed at reaching agreements.

data.title: Autonomy launches platform as a service for agentic AI, removing barriers for production-ready products.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in San Francisco, Autonomy revealed the general release of its platform, the first-ever platform-as-a-service tailored for autonomous AI products. This launch aims to tackle the primary obstacles developers encounter in transitioning to autonomous technology.
